variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is built from 'Employee benefit expenses', 'Other operating expenses', and 'Research & Development Expense'. The statement shows 'Total depreciation and amortization' as a separate same-level operating line above operating profit, indicating D&A is not embedded within those selected rows. Per the summary-vs-components rule, use only the summary row and not its component rows.
